docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BURGE, BRUCE AS TO DEFENDANT HALL, CARLOS SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
